data.title: Artera presents 4 abstracts at ASTRO 2025 showing potential of MMAI platform in personalizing cancer treatment decisions.
data.description: Artera, a company specializing in multimodal artificial intelligence (MMAI) cancer tests, is set to unveil four abstracts at the 2025 American Society for Radiation Oncology Annual Meeting (ASTRO). These abstracts highlight Artera's commitment to advancing personalized cancer treatment. Notable presentations include the validation of the ArteraAI Prostate Test in an Asian patient group, along with the quick development and validation of their MMAI-based tests. This showcases the company's dedication to cutting-edge cancer care.

data.title: ServisFirst Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: SFBS) will announce Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 20 at 4 p.m. ET. Website has more info.
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama, on September 26, 2025, ServisFirst Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: SFBS) will reveal its financial performance for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, on October 20, 2025, at 4 p.m. ET. The detailed announcement will be accessible on the company's official website, www.servisfirstbancshares.com.

data.title: HOVERAir now at Costco in 600+ stores across U.S., empowering people with personal videographer service.
data.description: HOVERAir, a personal videographer service, is now accessible throughout the United States. As of September 26, 2025, the service can be found at Costco locations, online, and in more than 600 retail stores. This collaboration signifies a significant achievement in HOVERAir's goal to enable individuals to immortalize their memorable moments.

data.title: GitHub employs proactive measures to protect developers from copyright infringement, amidst Cox v. Sony's potential impact on platform liability.
data.description: GitHub is taking on copyright challenges by prioritizing developers, amidst the U.S. Supreme Court case Cox v. Sony that could potentially alter platform accountability for copyright disputes. This case carries significant implications for the handling of copyright claims and may reshape legal precedents in this area. Stay informed for further updates on this development.

data.title: Allied Properties REIT (TSX:AP.UN) acquires remaining 50% interest in M4 in Vancouver, now owning property fully.
data.description: Today, Allied Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX:AP.UN) confirmed the finalization of acquiring an extra 50% stake in M4 of Main Alley Campus at 108 East 5th Avenue in Vancouver. This acquisition raises Allied's ownership in the property to 100%.

data.title: Stock market rebounds; Dow Jones Futures up, 5 stocks close to buy points. Tesla deliveries awaited.
data.description: Towards the end of the week, the key indexes showed a rebound. Palantir and DoorDash are approaching potential purchase points. There is anticipation surrounding Tesla's upcoming delivery figures and jobs data. Market insights suggest a positive trend as Dow Jones Futures rallied from critical support levels. Investors are keeping an eye on 5 particular stocks as they near potential buy points. Tesla's impending delivery report is generating significant interest.

data.title: Stock market breaks losing streaks, Dow Jones index climbs 300 points. Small caps rise after three-day decline.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index saw a significant increase of 300 points, marking a positive turn after several days of decline for small capitalizations. This surge resulted in the breaking of losing streaks for various indexes in the stock market. Particularly noteworthy was the rise in Electronic Arts shares, prompting interest and speculation among investors.

data.title: MiniLuxe finishes share issuance in exchange for debt repayment.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates in the country. The latest data indicates that the unemployment rate has risen to 7.5%, marking a notable uptick from the previous rate of 5.2%. This increase represents a 2.3% jump in unemployment, which has been attributed to various factors such as the ongoing economic slowdown and job market challenges. The total number of unemployed individuals in the country now stands at 2.5 million, reflecting the growing impact of the current economic climate on employment. Additionally, the youth unemployment rate has also experienced an increase, rising to 15.3% from the previous rate of 10.7%. These numbers underscore the pressing need for government intervention and support to address the rising unemployment levels and stimulate job creation in the country.
SPAIN UPGRADED TO A BY FITCH

data.title: Bitcoin's fall below $110K marked a 5% drop, the sharpest since March. Despite October's potential, long-term holders remain stable.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin has decreased by 5% this week, marking the most significant weekly decline since March. However, historical data for October and the consistent stability of long-term investors indicate a possibility of a rebound in the near future.

data.title: AKCA Leader Perry Miller praises Trump's 50% tariff on all kitchen cabinet imports, hails as historic move.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Washington, President Trump made a significant declaration of imposing a Section 232 tariff on various household products including kitchen cabinets, bathroom vanities, and related items. This decision was met with support from Perry Miller, the President of Kountry Wood Products and leader of the American Kitchen Cabinet Alliance (AKCA). This move will directly impact the prices and availability of these products in the market.

data.title: Resolution Medical Billing in Wanaque appoints new Operations Director and expands team to improve medical billing services.
data.description: In order to provide comprehensive medical billing services to our clients, it is critical for us to recruit skilled professionals who grasp the high standard of client dedication that the RMB team upholds. This commitment is evident in our recent recruitment drive in WANAQUE, N.J., announced on September 26, 2025. By bringing onboard experienced individuals, we aim to further enhance our services and meet the increasing demands of our clientele.
SCHUMER HAS EXIT STRATEGY IN EVENT OF GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN: WSJ

data.title: Elcora files overdue financial statements, confirms completion of annual and interim reports for 2025.
data.description: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, on September 26, 2025, ELCORA ADVANCED MATERIALS CORP. (TSX.V:ERA | Frankfurt:ELM0 | OTCQB: ECORF) provided an update regarding the Management Cease Trade Order (MCTO) issued by the Nova Scotia Securities Commission on July 30, 2025. The Company has successfully filed its audited annual financial statements for the year ending March 31, 2025, along with the necessary management discussion and analysis, and CEO and CFO certificates by the required deadline of July 29, 2025. Furthermore, ELCORA also submitted its interim financial statements for the period concluding on June 30, 2025, along with the corresponding management discussion and analysis, and CEO and CFO certificates within the stipulated timeframe by August 29, 2025.

data.title: Sempra to join Wolfe Research Conference 2025; CEO Jeffrey W. Martin & EVP Karen Sedgwick to participate.
data.description: Sempra Corporation (NYSE: SRE), headquartered in San Diego, revealed today that its executives will be attending the Wolfe Research Utilities, Midstream & Clean Energy Conference 2025. Among the attendees are Jeffrey W. Martin, the company's chairman and CEO, as well as Karen Sedgwick, executive vice president and CFO. This event provides a platform for discussing and exploring various energy-related topics. Sempra's involvement in such conferences indicates its commitment to staying abreast of industry trends and advancements.
Iran's President Pezeshkian: We are prepared to be transparent about our highly-enriched uranium.

data.title: EA stock rises on news of potential go-private deal by investor group.
data.description: The stock of Electronic Arts surged following reports that a consortium of investors is close to finalizing a deal to privatize the video game company. This news led to a significant increase in the company's stock value.

data.title: Biopharma stocks surge after Trump threatens 100% pharmaceuticals tariff, causing industry concerns.
data.description: This week, President Donald Trump intensified pressure on the pharmaceutical sector by proposing 100% tariffs on certain companies. In response, biopharma stocks saw a surge in value, signaling optimism among investors.

data.title: Crinetics Pharma's shares surged after FDA approved acromegaly drug Palsonify. Major approval news for company.
data.description: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals experienced a significant increase in stock price on Friday following the approval of their acromegaly drug, Palsonify, by the FDA. The news resulted in a surge in shares of the company. The FDA's approval marks a significant milestone for Crinetics Pharmaceuticals in the treatment of acromegaly. It is a positive development for the company as they strive to address the medical needs of patients with this growth disorder. This move led to a notable increase in the company's market value, showing investors' confidence in the newly approved treatment.
